data.description: IMF: Germany’s current account balance is expected to decline gradually over time but remain positive.

data.title: THE WHOO appoints Nicky Hilton Rothschild as Global Brand Ambassador to introduce Korean luxury skincare in US.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 12, 2026, THE WHOO, a renowned heritage skincare brand from South Korea, disclosed the selection of Nicky Hilton Rothschild as its Brand Ambassador. This move signifies a notable step in the brand's growth in the American luxury beauty market.

data.title: Western Copper and Gold increases financing to C$80 million due to high demand, working with Stifel Canada.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on February 12, 2026, Western Copper and Gold Corporation (TSX: WRN) (NYSE American: WRN) revealed that they have modified their agreement with Stifel Canada in response to a high level of investor interest. This amended deal was made by the Company with Stifel Canada, acting for both parties, due to growing demand.

data.title: Correction: KitchenAid introduces 2026 Color of the Year - Spearmint. Details follow.

data.title: MediStreams' Customer Advisory Board meeting highlights client-led innovation and healthcare payment automation progress; second annual meeting in Atlanta.
data.description: In Atlanta, MediStreams recently held its second annual Customer Advisory Board meeting to highlight advancements in healthcare payment automation. The event focused on innovation and collaboration in Revenue Cycle Management (RCM). The gathering aimed to enhance customer relations and showcase progress in the industry.

data.title: ITI named finalist for VR Crane Simulator at CONEXPO/CON-AGG Awards, shaping construction industry.
data.description: One of the leading training companies, Industrial Training International (ITI), an Interplay Learning company, has been recognized as a top innovator in the construction sector. Based in AUSTIN, Texas, this acknowledgement was received on Feb. 12, 2026. ITI is known for its expertise in providing training for industrial crafts and boasts a strong global presence in this field.

data.title: AerCap Holdings N.V. files annual report on Form 20-F for fiscal year 2025 with U.S. SEC.
data.description: Dublin, on February 12, 2026, AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE: AER) disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025, which includes the audited financial statements.

data.title: XRP price at $1.39 eyes $1.73 breakout as oversold market hints reversal. Technical analysis predicts a key resistance level for Ripple's recovery.
data.description: The digital asset XRP is currently being traded at $1.39, showing oversold conditions that could indicate a forthcoming reversal. Technical analysis suggests that a breakout above the $1.73 resistance level is crucial for Ripple's recovery rally.

data.title: Rochester Midland Corporation acquires Solid Blend Technologies, Inc. in an expansion move.
data.description: Rochester Midland Corporation, based in Rochester, N.Y., revealed on February 12, 2026, that they have successfully acquired Solid, a company specializing in route-based technical services and specialty chemical products. Rochester Midland is known for its offerings in water treatment and food safety, among other verticals. This acquisition strengthens the company's position in the market and expands its product range for customers.

data.title: Cambridge Wilkinson Investment Bank closes syndicated Series B SPV investment for AI infrastructure company, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: Today in New York, on February 12, 2026, the investment firm Cambridge Wilkinson disclosed the completion of a syndicated SPV investment in a Series B funding round for an AI hardware and technology company. This marks a major achievement for CW, signaling their continued support for companies in high-growth sectors.

data.title: Rizing Tide launches Tide Pool, a digital platform for PT students at CSM 2026, aiming to expand engagement.
data.description: A foundation is increasing involvement of physical therapy students through a new digital platform and on-site activities at CSM 2026 in Phoenix. Rizing Tide aims to broaden access to physical therapy and enhance inclusivity in the field. The initiative involves engaging with a larger number of students through the digital platform, along with hosting on-site programs at the mentioned event. This is part of the foundation's efforts to create a diverse and well-equipped workforce in physical therapy.

data.title: 22 leaders in research and education appointed to InCommon Steering and Advisory Committees in 2026 for secure collaboration.
data.description: Internet2 made a recent announcement on Feb. 12, 2026, appointing four fresh faces to the InCommon Steering Committee in addition to welcoming 18 new members to the InCommon Advisory Committees. This move strengthens community-led governance, which plays a crucial role in facilitating secure collaboration across a vast network of thousands.
